mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (spotify_id, email, display_name, access_token, refresh_token) VALUES (#{spotifyId}, #{email}, #{displayName}, #{accessToken}, #{refreshToken}) ON CONFLICT (spotify_id) DO UPDATE SET email = EXCLUDED.email, display_name = EXCLUDED.display_name, access_token = EXCLUDED.access_token, refresh_token = EXCLUDED.refresh_token
